tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.description: Manage storefront tenants and branding metadata.

fields.subdomainTooltip: The unique subdomain prefix used to access this storefront
fields.storeNameTooltip: The display name of the store shown to customers
fields.headline: Headline
fields.headlineTooltip: The main heading displayed on the storefront homepage hero section
fields.taglineTooltip: The subtitle text displayed below the headline on the homepage
fields.logoTextPlaceholder: Text shown in the nav bar
fields.logoTextTooltip: The text displayed in the navigation bar as the store logo
fields.publishableApiKeyTooltip: The public API key used by the storefront to authenticate requests to the backend
fields.regionIdTooltip: The Medusa region this storefront operates in (leave empty to use the default region)
fields.defaultLocaleTooltip: The default language for the storefront interface (en for English, he for Hebrew)

regionPayment.title: Payment providers are not selected
regionPayment.description: This region cannot accept payments until at least one provider is configured (for example, System).
regionPayment.tooltip: Each region requires at least one payment provider to process customer payments
